description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Only an operator with the relayer role can swap USDC to USDS via the PSM. To do so, they must call the

function on the Controller contract on mainnet, providing the usdcAmount (denominated in 1e6 precision to match PSM USDC handling). The operation will only succeed if the ALM Proxy holds at least the amount of USDC specified for the swap; otherwise, the transaction will revert. The rate limit configuration serves as whitelisting for swaps. Calling this function will carry out the following actions:
- The contract will confirm the relayer status of the operator. If the caller does not have the relayer role, the transaction will revert.
